summary: Produces a relative path from a directory-like starting point to a contained target, or returns the target unchanged when no suitable relationship can be established.
signature_intent: Accepts two string path inputs and returns a string path result.
behavior: Treats an empty starting point as the current directory marker.
Normalizes one trailing slash from the starting point before comparison.
When the target is inside the starting point, returns the target portion relative to it.
When the target is inside an ancestor of the starting point, prefixes the result with one parent-directory segment per ancestor step.
Returns the target unchanged when no usable shared ancestor is found.
edge_cases: Empty starting point only works as relative current-directory input when the target begins accordingly.
A starting point without a parent segment causes the target to be returned unchanged if it is not already a prefix match.
Filesystem or URL-like root boundaries are treated as a stop condition and return the target unchanged.
